channel.title: GitHub Vue Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Vue in GitHub

item.title: vueComponent/ant-design-vue
item.description: 🌈 An enterprise-class UI components based on Ant Design and Vue. 🐜

item.title: Requarks/wiki
item.description: Wiki.js | A modern and powerful wiki app built on Node.js

item.title: xiaoxian521/vue-pure-admin
item.description: 🔥 ✨✨ ✨ Vue3.0+TypeScript+Vite2.0+Element-Plus编写的一套后台管理系统

item.title: abhisheknaiidu/awesome-github-profile-readme
item.description: 😎 A curated list of awesome Github Profile READMEs 📝

item.title: lusaxweb/vuesax
item.description: New Framework Components for Vue.js 2

item.title: Molunerfinn/PicGo
item.description: 🚀A simple & beautiful tool for pictures uploading built by vue-cli-electron-builder

item.title: chaitin/xray
item.description: 一款完善的安全评估工具，支持常见 web 安全问题扫描和自定义 poc | 使用之前务必先阅读文档

item.title: nocodb/nocodb
item.description: 🔥 🔥 The Open Source Airtable alternative.

item.title: DataV-Team/DataV
item.description: Vue数据可视化组件库（类似阿里DataV，大屏数据展示），提供SVG的边框及装饰、图表、水位图、飞线图等组件，简单易用，长期更新(React版已发布)

item.title: iczer/vue-antd-admin
item.description: 🐜 Ant Design Pro's implementation with Vue

item.title: airyland/vux
item.description: Mobile UI Components based on Vue & WeUI

item.title: anncwb/vue-vben-admin
item.description: A modern vue admin. It is based on Vue3, vite and TypeScript. It's fast！

item.title: jeecgboot/jeecg-uniapp
item.description: JEECG BOOT APP 移动解决方案，采用uniapp框架，一份代码多终端适配，同时支持APP、小程序、H5！实现了与JeecgBoot平台完美对接的移动解决方案！目前已经实现登录、用户信息、通讯录、公告、移动首页、九宫格等基础功能。

item.title: PanJiaChen/vue-element-admin
item.description: 🎉 A magical vue admin https://panjiachen.github.io/vue-element-admin

item.title: cadriel/fluidd
item.description: Fluidd, the klipper UI.

item.title: emqx/MQTTX
item.description: MQTT X - Elegant Cross-platform MQTT 5.0 Desktop Client

item.title: RainManGO/vue3-composition-admin
item.description: 🎉 基于vue3 的管理端模板(Vue3 TS Vuex4 element-plus vue-i18n-next composition-api) vue3-admin vue3-ts-admin

item.title: Merkie/freespeech
item.description: A free program designed to help the non-verbal.

item.title: beekeeper-studio/beekeeper-studio
item.description: Modern and easy to use SQL client for MySQL, Postgres, SQLite, SQL Server, and more. Linux, MacOS, and Windows.

item.title: view-design/ViewUI
item.description: A high quality UI Toolkit built on Vue.js 2.0

item.title: MyEtherWallet/MyEtherWallet
item.description: MyEtherWallet (our friends call us MEW) is a free, client-side interface helping you interact with the Ethereum blockchain.

item.title: rogden/tailwind-config-viewer
item.description: A local UI tool for visualizing your Tailwind CSS configuration file.

item.title: vueComponent/ant-design-vue-pro
item.description: 👨🏻‍💻👩🏻‍💻 Use Ant Design Vue like a Pro!

item.title: cmdparkour/vue-admin-box
item.description: element-plus and vue3 admin box.

item.title: ModernCloud/moderncloud
item.description: ModernCloud is a browser-based serverless platform that lets developers build functions and endpoints in minutes.
